speaker: Rumia
dialog: Hehe, found you, Wriggle! You're not very good at hiding, are you?

speaker: Wriggle
dialog: Tch, you caught me... But I'm not going down without a fight! Let's see how you handle my Bug Dance!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Now you know how powerful I am! But you hid pretty well—I almost lost you.

speaker: Wriggle
dialog: Hmph, if I hadn't let my guard down, you wouldn't have caught me so easily! But since you did, I'll tell you a little secret.

speaker: Wriggle
dialog: That idiot Cirno was bragging about being the strongest by the lake earlier. She's probably still there if you want to find her.

speaker: Rumia
dialog: The lake? Thanks, Wriggle! I'll go catch her right now!

speaker: Wriggle
dialog: Wait! Don't tell her I told you! I don't want to get turned into an ice block…

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Found you, Cirno! I knew you'd be here!

speaker: Crino
dialog: Whoa! You scared me! Oh, it's just you, Rumia~ But even if you found me, it doesn't matter! I'm the strongest!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: The strongest? We'll see about that! I already caught Wriggle, and now it's your turn!

speaker: Crino
dialog: Hmph! Wriggle's just weak! I'm different—watch my ice danmaku turn you into a popsicle!

speaker: Crino
dialog: Ugh... How is this possible! I'm the strongest! How could I lose to you!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Now I've caught you too! You can try being the strongest next time!

speaker: Crino
dialog: Hmph! I just went easy on you this time! I'll definitely win next time!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Found you, Sunny! What are you looking for?

speaker: Sunny Milk
dialog: Whoa! Rumia? How did you find me? I was hiding so well!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: I'm a pro at hide-and-seek! But it looks like you're searching for someone else?

speaker: Sunny Milk
dialog: Yeah, I'm looking for Luna and Star! We were supposed to play together, but they wandered off somewhere… But I'm not letting you catch me!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: No way! If I found you, you're mine! Come on, let's see how strong your danmaku is!

speaker: Sunny Milk
dialog: Ugh... I'm not going down that easily!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Hey! Wait! You've already lost, so just admit defeat!

speaker: Sunny Milk
dialog: No way! I'm one of the Three Fairies—I can't get caught alone! Once I find Luna and Star, we'll take you on together!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Huh? Nitori! What are you doing here? Are you playing hide-and-seek too?

speaker: Nitori Kawashiro
dialog: Eh? Hide-and-seek? No no no, I'm just delivering the machine for Reimu. I don't have time for games.

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Delivering things? Don't lie to me! You must be here to help Sunny! Tell me which way she went!

speaker: Nitori Kawashiro
dialog: I'm really just passing through… But if you must know, I think she flew off that way.

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Thanks! But since you're here, why not join the fun? I can't let you go that easily!

speaker: Nitori Kawashiro
dialog: Wait! I told you I'm not part of this! Don't drag me into it!

speaker: Nitori Kawashiro
dialog: Oh no! My machine! Rumia, look what you've done!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Huh? What is this thing? Why is it moving on its own?

speaker: Nitori Kawashiro
dialog: This is bad! The machine wasn't fully tested yet, and now it's activated and out of control!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Phew… I finally stopped it! Huh? Wait, what's that sound? No way… Whoa! It exploded!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: I least the machine stopped, right?

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Haha, I finally found you all! Now you can't run away!

speaker: Sunny Milk
dialog: Rumia, you're really persistent! But with the three of us together, you're not going to win so easily!

speaker: Luna
dialog: That's right! We're the Three Fairies, the strongest team! You can't take us on alone!

speaker: Star Sapphire
dialog: Rumia, why don't you just give up? It's not too late to admit defeat!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Now I've caught all of you! The Three Fairies aren't so tough after all!

speaker: Sunny Milk
dialog: Ugh… How is this possible! We lost even with the three of us together!

speaker: Luna
dialog: Rumia, since when did your danmaku get so strong? That's not fair!

speaker: Star Sapphire
dialog: Yeah, yeah! You must have been practicing in secret! There's no way you could beat us otherwise!

speaker: Lily White
dialog: ( ˶ˆᗜˆ˵ )

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Mystia! Finally found you! You sure look relaxed!

speaker: Mystia Lorelei
dialog: Oh, Rumia? What brings you here? I was just practicing a new song~

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Don't play dumb! We're playing hide-and-seek, and now it's my turn to catch you!

speaker: Mystia Lorelei
dialog: Oh? Hide-and-seek, huh~ But I'm not going to let you catch me so easily. How about listening to my new song? It might just make you let your guard down!

speaker: Mystia Lorelei
dialog: Ugh... I didn't expect your danmaku to be this strong. I admit defeat, you caught me.

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Now I've caught everyone! I'm the champion of tonight's hide-and-seek!

speaker: Mystia Lorelei
dialog: Hmph, I won't lose so easily next time! I'll definitely beat you with my song!

speaker: Crino
dialog: Rumia! Finally found you! Reimu's really mad, you know!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Huh? Cirno? Didn't I already catch you? Why are you here again?

speaker: Crino
dialog: Hmph! This isn't about hide-and-seek anymore! You broke Nitori's machine, and Reimu's looking everywhere for you! She ordered me to catch you!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Ahaha… That machine exploded on its own! And I'm not about to let Reimu catch me!

speaker: Crino
dialog: No way! I'm the strongest! This time, I'll definitely catch you and hand you over to Reimu!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Huh? Why is everyone running? What's going on?

speaker: Reimu
dialog: Rumia, you've been quite the troublemaker! I should've known Cirno wouldn't be able to handle you.

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Reimu? What are you doing here? I was just playing hide-and-seek…

speaker: Reimu
dialog: Hide-and-seek? You've gone too far this time! You broke my machine, and it was something really important!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Well… the machine exploded on its own! And it's not like I meant to break it…

speaker: Reimu
dialog: Whether you meant to or not, you're going to face the consequences! I can't let you cause any more trouble!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Ugh… Reimu's so scary! But I'm not going down without a fight! If you want to catch me, you'll have to try harder than that!

speaker: Reimu
dialog: I didn't expect you to last this long… I underestimated you.

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Reimu, I'm stronger than you think! Catching me won't be so easy!

speaker: Reimu
dialog: But the game ends here. I'm not holding back anymore!

speaker: Scene
dialog: In the shrine's courtyard, Rumia and her friends are lined up as Reimu scolds them with her hands on her hips. Daiyousei, Luna, and Star are also present.

speaker: Reimu
dialog: You guys really went too far this time! Rumia, especially you! Playing hide-and-seek is one thing, but destroyed the machine sent by Nitori. That's too much!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Ugh… I'm sorry, okay? Reimu's so mean…

speaker: Crino
dialog: Seriously, why did I get dragged into this? I was just following Reimu's orders to catch Rumia!

speaker: Daiyousei
dialog: Come on, Cirno, you looked like you were having fun too!

speaker: Crino
dialog: N-no way! I wasn't!

speaker: Sunny Milk
dialog: We were just playing along with Rumia! Who knew things would turn out like this…

speaker: Luna
dialog: But hey, tonight's hide-and-seek was pretty fun, right?

speaker: Star Sapphire
dialog: Yeah, yeah! Even though we got caught by Reimu in the end, it was super exciting!Yeah, yeah! Even though we got caught by Reimu in the end, it was super exciting!

speaker: Wriggle
dialog: I was the first one caught by Rumia! Talk about bad luck…

speaker: Mystia Lorelei
dialog: And I think I found some inspiration for my new song!

speaker: Nitori
dialog: Hey, hey, stop chatting! My machine is still smoking! Reimu, the shrine's circuits are fried too—you're paying for the repairs!

speaker: Reimu
dialog: What? Repair costs? Nitori, this is clearly Rumia's fault!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Huh? Why is it my fault again?

speaker: Daiyousei
dialog: Alright, alright, let's not argue. What's done is done. Why don't we all help with the repairs?

speaker: Scene
dialog: In the Forest of Magic under the moonlight, Rumia and her friends gather to start a game of hide-and-seek.

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Alright, is everyone here? Tonight, I'll be 'it'! You better hide well, because I'm coming for you!

speaker: Crino
dialog: Hmph! Rumia, you'll never catch me! I'm the strongest, and no one can find me when I hide!

speaker: Daiyousei
dialog: Cirno, you always say that, but you're always the first one found…

speaker: Sunny Milk
dialog: I'm not going down so easily this time! Luna, Star, and I have already found the perfect hiding spot!

speaker: Luna
dialog: That's right! We're the Three Fairies, and we're the best at hide-and-seek!

speaker: Star Sapphire
dialog: Rumia, you'd better watch out! Our danmaku isn't just for show!

speaker: Wriggle
dialog: Hmph, I'm not losing to any of you! Rumia, bring it on!

speaker: Mystia Lorelei
dialog: Oh my, this sounds fun~ But my singing might just distract you!

speaker: Rumia
dialog: Haha everyone's so confident! I'll have to take this seriously then! Ready or not, here I come!

speaker: Scene
dialog: Thank for your play
